message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Send file to inbox

actor "User" as User
participant "REST" as REST
participant "Lookup Service" as LookupService
participant "VFS Service" as VFSService
participant "Storage Service" as StorageService
participant "S3" as S3

User -> LookupService: get User2 inbox info 🔐(login/password)
LookupService --> User: User2 🔐public key and /inbox access creds
User -> StorageService: encrypt and save file to user's inbox location
StorageService -> S3: persistence
S3 --> StorageService: success
StorageService --> User: success

@enduml
```
